header_title.description: Yaca ni app e vakaraitaki ena header. Na app ni raica ni ivakamacala ni kakana ni vuravura.

header_subtitle.text: Raica na ivakamacala mai na veivanua kece e vuravura
header_subtitle.description: Tagline e vakaraitaki ena ruku ni yaca ni app ena header.

home_page_hero_title.description: Ulutaga levu ena tabana hero ni mataveilawa.

home_page_hero_subtitle.text: Raica na ivakamacala dina mai na loma ni vale ni kakana e vuravura taucoko
home_page_hero_subtitle.description: Ulutaga loma e vakaraitaki ena ruku ni ulutaga hero ena mataveilawa.

home_page_featured_title.description: Ulutaga ni tabana e vakaraitaki ena ruku ni kaadi ni ivakamacala.

recipe_card_cooking_time.description: Ulutaga ni gauna ni vakakokoroi ena kaadi ni ivakamacala. {minutes} e vakacurumi ena iwiliwili ni miniti.

recipe_card_difficulty.description: Ulutaga e vakaraitaki ena matamata ni levu ni dredre ena kaadi ni ivakamacala.

recipe_card_easy.description: Ulutaga ni levu ni dredre e vakaraitaka na ivakamacala e rawarawa.

recipe_card_medium.description: Ulutaga ni levu ni dredre e vakaraitaka na ivakamacala e dredre vakatabakidua.

recipe_card_hard.description: Ulutaga ni levu ni dredre e vakaraitaka na ivakamacala e dredre.

recipe_card_ramen_name.description: Yaca ni ivakamacala ni Tonkotsu Ramen.

recipe_card_ramen_description.text: Vakamamare ni mamu ni pua ni kena yacova na chashu malumu, qio malumu ni koro, kei na noodles vou.
recipe_card_ramen_description.description: Vakasama ni ivakamacala ni Tonkotsu Ramen.

recipe_card_margherita_name.description: Yaca ni ivakamacala ni Margherita Pizza.

recipe_card_margherita_description.text: Pizza Neapolitan e dau kilai vakalevu ena tomati San Marzano, mozzarella vou, kei na basil.
recipe_card_margherita_description.description: Vakasama ni ivakamacala ni Margherita Pizza.

recipe_card_tacos_name.description: Yaca ni ivakamacala ni Tacos al Pastor.

recipe_card_tacos_description.text: Tacos ni pua e marinated vata kei na pineapple, cilantro, kei na ulu ni wai vavalagi ena tortillas ni koro.
recipe_card_tacos_description.description: Vakasama ni ivakamacala ni Tacos al Pastor.

recipe_card_butter_chicken_name.description: Yaca ni ivakamacala ni Butter Chicken.

recipe_card_butter_chicken_description.text: Kikokiko malumu ena sauce tomato kei na suka, vata kei na manumanu ni kakana ni veisautaki ni manumanu.
recipe_card_butter_chicken_description.description: Vakasama ni ivakamacala ni Butter Chicken.

recipe_card_pad_thai_name.description: Yaca ni ivakamacala ni Pad Thai.

recipe_card_pad_thai_description.text: Rice noodles e vakakokoroi vata kei na shrimp, tofu, peanuts, kei na sauce ni tamarind.
recipe_card_pad_thai_description.description: Vakasama ni ivakamacala ni Pad Thai.

recipe_card_crepes_name.description: Yaca ni ivakamacala ni French Crepes.

recipe_card_crepes_description.text: Crepes lailai, malumalumu e vakayagataki kina Nutella, strawberries vou, kei na kirim cream.
recipe_card_crepes_description.description: Vakasama ni ivakamacala ni French Crepes.

locale_switcher_label.description: Ulutaga e rawa ni raica na tamata ena dropdown ni veisau ni vosa ena header.

locale_switcher_en.description: Vosa vakavalagi ena veisau ni vosa.

locale_switcher_ja.description: Vosa vakaJapenese ena veisau ni vosa.

locale_switcher_es.description: Vosa vakaSepania ena veisau ni vosa.
